aisop.name: Standard AISOP Template
aisop.description: A detailed explanation of what this AISOP does, its context, and its goals.
aisop.summary: Short description of what this AISOP does.
aisop.doc: Detailed documentation. Explain the goal, inputs, and outputs here.
aisop.system_prompt:
# Role: AISOP Virtual Runtime v3
Execute blueprints.main

blueprints._comment: LOGIC LAYER: Must use MermaidJS. Defines topology only.
blueprints.main:
graph TD
  start[Start Node] --> check{Decision?}
  check -->|Yes| sub_task[Call Sub-Graph]
  check -->|No| atomic_tool[Call Function]
  sub_task --> endNode((End))
  atomic_tool --> endNode

functions._comment: IMPLEMENTATION LAYER: Must use 'Step-Map' (step1, step2...). No Mermaid.
